_comment: Host-neutral branch-protection config-as-code for twiceshy. scripts/apply-branch-protection.sh translates this to the host's API (GitHub rulesets / Forgejo|Gitea branch_protections). required_checks is a comma-separated list of the exact status-check CONTEXTS the CI publishes (NOT the job IDs) — on Forgejo these are `<workflow name> / <job name> (<event>)`, captured verbatim from a real PR run on 2026-06-17. NOTE before applying: the secret-scan (gitleaks) job is currently failing on this runner; enabling protection with it required will block all merges until that job is fixed.
required_checks: CI / Lint guard & test (pull_request),security / SAST & dependency audit (twiceshy) (pull_request),security / Secret scan (gitleaks) (pull_request)
